modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook view unexpectedly changed and won't revert to original settings.

full_description_text: 
The user reported that their Outlook view suddenly changed today and they are unable to restore it to the previous layout. They mentioned that the middle pane now displays more information than they prefer. Additionally, they experienced an issue where the font resets when they delete and retype lines in their message.
short_description: Outlook view unexpectedly changed and won't revert to original settings.
description: The user reported that their Outlook view suddenly changed today and they are unable to restore it to the previous layout. They mentioned that the middle pane now displays more information than they prefer. Additionally, they experienced an issue where the font resets when they delete and retype lines in their message.
